description: Output specification, record identification and control (externally described)
help: Record identification and control entries for an externally described file (positions 7-39).

parameters.name: RCDNAME
parameters.help: The name of the external record format to write to.

parameters.name: OUTTYPE
parameters.help: H = heading, D = detail, T = total, E = exception.

parameters.name: ADDDEL
parameters.help: ADD = add the record, DEL = delete it.

parameters.name: OUTIND
parameters.help: Indicators that condition the output (three sets).

parameters.name: EXCEPTNAME
parameters.help: The name referred to by an EXCEPT operation.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
